---
title: "Shiny Paper Poster"
---

In this project, I collaborated with Zoe Doherty to create a poster summarizing the claims, methodologies, and conclusions established by a review paper of Shiny, titled ["Six Years of Shiny in Research - Collaborative Development of Web Tools in R"](https://journal.r-project.org/articles/RJ-2021-004/). Our poster can be found [here](Project_Poster.pdf).
